name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotConfigureArmsHelper.Fling2MStiffL
summary:
Muscle stiffness of the left arm.
            If negative then uses the shots underlying muscle stiffness from controlStiffness (i.e. respects looseness).
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = -1.0f.
            Max value = 1.5f.
